user_visible_status: The repository is ready to start manual source snapshot work, but the public site does not yet show real major-country timetable data.
operation_status: Source groups, sample targets, parser contracts, placeholder extraction shapes, and audit traceability are prepared. Manual source snapshots, real normalized samples, UI display, and update operations are still not complete.
explicit_not_complete: no real source snapshots captured yet
no real normalized timetable records generated yet
no public timetable UI for major-country data yet
no cron or scheduled update process
next_pr_goal: Add the manual source snapshot schema and first batch plan for real official-source confirmation.
